annotations.transcription: So I'm just... we should have a standard way to do that
Yeah, because I asked the LLM, like, what am I supposed to get from this, like, from the VAD?
And it said, like, for a phoneme model, you need to get, like, an audio, I mean, not audio, like, a file with start, end, and the text as well.
And then from that, you will, like, find the words with phoneme model.
